_note: User/agent-editable config. Seeded from tools/ on first activation. Edits here persist across extension updates — deployed to comfyai/_extension/hiddenswitch/config/ on each activation. Add filenames to REMOVE from the known-model list here.
_format: Add exact filename strings as they appear in comfyai/available-models.json. The match is against str(model), which is save_with_filename if set, otherwise the bare filename (no repo path prefix).
